race.comment: MONARQUE DU TRIEUX (4) returned after more than six months off the track running 0.75L second at this circuit. Selected to go one better and secure the first win of his career. MOVING QUICK (2) left two DQ behind registering a 3L second in a Class E race at Vincennes. Rates a major threat dropping in grade. MILZANO DU BOSSU (3) looks well placed to shine on the back of a 3.5L second at Nantes racing in this shoeing combination for the first time. Shortlist. With a new shoeing combination tried MISIDORE (12) is another with claims making his first appearance since finishing 22L eighth at Nantes in October.
race.protest_reason: #8 Must De Lou was DSQ from 3rd
